description: The first maintained, agent-native CLI for Agilix Buzz — every DLAP command plus offline activity analytics, content review, and a local database no other Buzz tool has.

tools.name: announcements_get
tools.description: This command gets an announcement, which is a file that conforms to the Announcement format. Optional: entityid, path, filepath (plus 2 more).

tools.name: announcements_get-info
tools.description: This command gets information about an announcement. Optional: entityid, path.

tools.name: announcements_get-list
tools.description: This command lists an entity's announcements. Optional: entityid, modifieddate.

tools.name: announcements_get-user-list
tools.description: This command lists course, section, and domain announcements for the current user. Optional: userid, daysactivepastend.

tools.name: announcements_list-restorable
tools.description: This command lists domainor course announcements that have been deleted and can be restored. Optional: entityid.

tools.name: announcements_put
tools.description: This command posts an announcement to the domain or course specified by entityid . Optional: entityid, path.

tools.name: announcements_restore
tools.description: This command restores one or more domain or course announcements. Optional: entityid, path, version.

tools.name: announcements_update-viewed
tools.description: This command updates the viewed state of one or more domain announcements for the current signed-on user. Optional: entityid, path, version (plus 1 more).

tools.name: assessments_get-attempt
tools.description: This command returns the data needed for an assessment or homework attempt. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, groupid (plus 3 more).

tools.name: assessments_get-attempt-file
tools.description: This command gets a uploaded file associated with a fileupload question. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, partid (plus 2 more).

tools.name: assessments_get-attempt-review
tools.description: This command returns the data needed to review an assessment or homework attempt. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, groupid (plus 7 more).

tools.name: assessments_get-next-question
tools.description: Submits answers for the current question in an adpative assessment. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, action (plus 3 more).

tools.name: assessments_get-question
tools.description: This command gets one question from a course. Optional: entityid, questionid.

tools.name: assessments_get-question-scores
tools.description: This command scores one or more question submissions. Optional: type.

tools.name: assessments_get-question-stats
tools.description: This command gets system-wide statistics about a particular question. Optional: entityid, questionid, version.

tools.name: assessments_get-submission-state
tools.description: Retrieves state information for an enrollment's assessment or homework submission, including whether the enrollment can start, resume, or re. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, utcoffset (plus 1 more).

tools.name: assessments_list-questions
tools.description: This command lists one or more questions in a course. Optional: entityid, questionid, query (plus 4 more).

tools.name: assessments_list-restorable-questions
tools.description: This command lists questions that have been deleted and can be restored. Optional: entityid.

tools.name: assessments_put-attempt-file
tools.description: This command puts files on the server to be associated with a fileupload question as part of a student assessment/homework attempt. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, partid.

tools.name: assessments_put-questions
tools.description: This command puts (adds or updates) one or more questions in a course. Optional: entityid, questionid, schema (plus 3 more).

tools.name: assessments_restore-questions
tools.description: This command restores one or more questions in a course. Optional: entityid, questionid, version.

tools.name: assessments_save-attempt-answers
tools.description: Save answers for an assessment of homework group attempt for later use. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, groupid (plus 5 more).

tools.name: assessments_submit-attempt-answers
tools.description: Submits answers for an assessment of homework group attempt for grading. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, groupid (plus 3 more).

tools.name: badges_create
tools.description: This command creates a badge. Optional: entityid, imageentityid, imagepath (plus 6 more).

tools.name: badges_get
tools.description: This command gets the badge image. Optional: entityid, badgeid.

tools.name: badges_get-assertion
tools.description: This command gets the assertion associated with a badge. Optional: entityid, badgeid.

tools.name: badges_get-list
tools.description: This command gets a list of badges for a user. Optional: entityid, query.

tools.name: blogs_get
tools.description: This command gets a blog or journal message, which conforms to the Message format. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, messageid (plus 2 more).

tools.name: blogs_get-list
tools.description: This command returns a list of blog or journal messages for the specified enrollment and item, ordered by message creationdate . Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, parentid (plus 6 more).

tools.name: blogs_get-recent-posts
tools.description: This command returns recent posts to discussion boards, wikis, blogs and journals that have not been marked as viewed. Optional: enrollmentid, date, rows (plus 1 more).

tools.name: blogs_get-summary
tools.description: This command returns a blog or journal summary for each enrollment in the specified entity. Optional: entityid, itemid.

tools.name: blogs_put
tools.description: This command puts a blog or journal message to the server. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, messageid (plus 2 more).

tools.name: blogs_update-viewed
tools.description: This command updates a user’s viewed state of one or more blog messages. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, messageid (plus 2 more).

tools.name: conversion_export-data
tools.description: This command convert structured post data to a tab or comma-delimited file. Optional: to, saveto, bom (plus 1 more).

tools.name: conversion_get-converted-data
tools.description: Retrieves the converted data generated from either ImportData or ExportData and deletes the temporary file. Optional: path, name.

tools.name: conversion_import-data
tools.description: This command imports and converts various data formats. Optional: from, saveto, responsetype (plus 3 more).

tools.name: courses_copy
tools.description: This command copies one or more courses. Optional: courseid, domainid, action (plus 11 more).

tools.name: courses_create
tools.description: This command creates one or more courses. Optional: title, domainid, schema (plus 9 more).

tools.name: courses_create-demo
tools.description: This command creates a demo course. Optional: courseid, domainid, schema (plus 5 more).

tools.name: courses_deactivate
tools.description: This command deactivates a course. Optional: courseid.

tools.name: courses_get
tools.description: This command gets information for a course. Optional: courseid, select, version.

tools.name: courses_list
tools.description: This command lists courses. Optional: domainid, includedescendantdomains, limit (plus 6 more).

tools.name: courses_merge
tools.description: This command merges the deltas from a derivative course into its immediate base course. Optional: courseid.

tools.name: courses_restore
tools.description: This command restores a deleted course. Optional: courseid.

tools.name: courses_update
tools.description: This command updates the title, reference, data (free-form XML), and other attributes of one or more courses. Optional: courseid, domainid, title (plus 9 more).

tools.name: datastreams_get-data-stream-configuration
tools.description: This command gets the data stream configuration previously set using SetDataStreamConfiguration for a specified domain. Optional: domainid.

tools.name: datastreams_set-data-stream-configuration
tools.description: This command tests a given data stream configuration to see if it is valid and if the API servers can connect to it and if successful, sets. Optional: domainid, test, title (plus 13 more).

tools.name: discussions_get-message
tools.description: This command returns a discussion forum message. Optional: entityid, itemid, messageid (plus 4 more).

tools.name: discussions_get-message-list
tools.description: This command returns the messages associated with a discussion board of an entity. Optional: entityid, itemid, groupid (plus 1 more).

tools.name: discussions_list-restorable-messages
tools.description: This command lists messages that have been deleted from a entity and can be restored. Optional: entityid.

tools.name: discussions_put-message
tools.description: This command puts a discussion board message to the server. Optional: entityid, itemid, groupid (plus 3 more).

tools.name: discussions_put-message-part
tools.description: This command puts individual parts of a discussion board message to the server. Optional: entityid, itemid, messageid (plus 4 more).

tools.name: discussions_restore-messages
tools.description: This command restores one or more messages in a discussion forum. Optional: entityid, itemid, messageid (plus 2 more).

tools.name: discussions_submit-message
tools.description: This command assembles changes from the PutMessagePart and DeleteMessagePart commands into a new message and posts the new message to the se. Optional: entityid, itemid, messageid (plus 3 more).

tools.name: discussions_update-message-viewed
tools.description: This command updates a user’s viewed state of one or more discussion board messages. Optional: entityid, itemid, messageid (plus 3 more).

tools.name: domains_create
tools.description: This command creates one or more domains and links them as children to the domain specified by parentid. Optional: name, userspace, parentid (plus 2 more).

tools.name: domains_get
tools.description: This command gets information for the specified domain. Optional: domainid, select.

tools.name: domains_get-content
tools.description: This command returns the list of content items for the current signed-on user’s domain.

tools.name: domains_get-enrollment-metrics
tools.description: This command gets enrollment metrics for courses in the specified domain. Optional: domainid, skipempty.

tools.name: domains_get-enrollment-metrics-parameters
tools.description: This command gets parameters that affect calculations used in Enrollment Metrics , Course EnrollmentMetrics , and GetDomainEnrollmentMetrics. Optional: domainid.

tools.name: domains_get-parent-list
tools.description: This command gets the list of parent domains for a domain. Optional: domainid, path, includesource.

tools.name: domains_get-settings
tools.description: Retrieve domain-hierarchy-merged application settings (no auth required). Optional: domainid, path, includesource.

tools.name: domains_get-stats
tools.description: This command gets statistics for a domain. Optional: domainid, options, recurse.

tools.name: domains_list
tools.description: This command lists domains. Optional: domainid, includedescendantdomains, limit (plus 5 more).

tools.name: domains_restore
tools.description: This command restores a deleted domain. Optional: domainid.

tools.name: domains_update
tools.description: This command updates the name, reference value, flags, and free-forn structured data of one or more domains. Optional: domainid, name, parentid (plus 2 more).

tools.name: enrollments_create
tools.description: This command enrolls a user with the specified rights in a course. Optional: disallowduplicates, disallowsamestatusduplicates, userid (plus 9 more).

tools.name: enrollments_get
tools.description: This command gets enrollment data for a particular enrollment. Optional: enrollmentid, select.

tools.name: enrollments_get-activity
tools.description: This command gets the activity detail for the specified user enrollment. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, startdate (plus 4 more).

tools.name: enrollments_get-gradebook
tools.description: This command gets the gradebook detail, including rolled-up period, category, and course grades, for the specified user enrollment. Optional: enrollmentid, forcerequireditems, gradingschemeid (plus 4 more).

tools.name: enrollments_get-group-list
tools.description: This command lists groups that the specified enrollment is a member of. Optional: enrollmentid, setid.

tools.name: enrollments_get-metrics-report
tools.description: Returns report data for the enrollment metrics of a domain, teacher, or student. Optional: entityid, report, daysactivepastend (plus 6 more).

tools.name: enrollments_list
tools.description: This command lists enrollments. Optional: domainid, includedescendantdomains, limit (plus 9 more).

tools.name: enrollments_list-by-teacher
tools.description: This command lists enrollments in courses where the specified user is a teacher. Optional: teacheruserid, teacherallstatus, teacherdaysactivepastend (plus 5 more).

tools.name: enrollments_list-entity
tools.description: This command lists enrollments in the specified entity. Optional: entityid, privileges, allstatus (plus 3 more).

tools.name: enrollments_list-user
tools.description: This command lists enrollments for the specified user. Optional: userid, allstatus, entityid (plus 4 more).

tools.name: enrollments_put-self-assessment
tools.description: This command puts self-assessment ratings of understanding, interest, and effort into the student's Enrollment Metrics . Optional: enrollmentid, understanding, interest (plus 1 more).

tools.name: enrollments_restore
tools.description: This command restores a deleted enrollment. Optional: enrollmentid.

tools.name: enrollments_update
tools.description: This command updates the enrollment status, start date, end date, and rights granted to the specified user for a course. Optional: enrollmentid, userid, entityid (plus 8 more).

tools.name: files_copy
tools.description: This command copies one or more resources from the domain or course specified by sourceentityid to the domain or course specified by destina. Optional: sourceentityid, sourcepath, destinationentityid (plus 1 more).

tools.name: files_get
tools.description: This command gets resource metadata and/or binary content for the course, section, enrollment, user, or domain. Optional: entityid, path, version (plus 3 more).

tools.name: files_get-document
tools.description: This command retrieves a user document from the server. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, path (plus 1 more).

tools.name: files_get-document-info
tools.description: This command retrieves information about one or more user documents from the server. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, path.

tools.name: files_get-entity-id
tools.description: This command gets the resource entity ID of the specified entity. Optional: entityid.

tools.name: files_get-info
tools.description: This command gets information about a resource in the domain, course, section, or enrollment specified by entityid . Optional: entityid, path, class.

tools.name: files_get-list
tools.description: This command lists metadata for entity (domain, course, or enrollment) resources. Optional: entityid, path, recurse (plus 4 more).

tools.name: files_list-restorable
tools.description: This command lists resources that have been deleted and can be restored. Optional: entityid.

tools.name: files_list-restorable-documents
tools.description: This command lists documents that have been deleted and can be restored. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid.

tools.name: files_put
tools.description: This command puts a resource to the server for the specified course, section, enrollment, user, or domain. Optional: entityid, path, status (plus 3 more).

tools.name: files_put-folders
tools.description: This command creates one or more resource folders for a domain or course. Optional: entityid, path.

tools.name: files_restore
tools.description: This command restores one or more resources in a domain, course, or enrollment. Optional: entityid, path, version.

tools.name: files_restore-documents
tools.description: This command restores one or more documents. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, path (plus 1 more).

tools.name: gradebook_calculate-enrollment-scenario
tools.description: This command calculates a rolled-up (category, period, and course) grade scenario for the specified user enrollment given the supplied input. Optional: enrollmentid, gradingschemeid, zerounscored (plus 3 more).

tools.name: gradebook_get-calendar
tools.description: Gets the iCalendar (RFC2445) file of events for the user or enrollments specified by token. Optional: token.

tools.name: gradebook_get-calendar-items
tools.description: This command gets duedates and blackoutdates for the specified enrollments. Optional: userid, enrollmentid.

tools.name: gradebook_get-calendar-token
tools.description: Get a token to generate a URL that can retrieve the current user's calendar without any authentication. Optional: enrollment, appname.

tools.name: gradebook_get-certificates
tools.description: This command gets the completion certificates associated with a course or section enrollment. Optional: enrollmentid.

tools.name: gradebook_get-due-soon-list
tools.description: This command gets list of items that will soon become due for a student. Optional: userid, enrollmentid, showcompleted (plus 3 more).

tools.name: gradebook_get-entity-summary
tools.description: This command gets grade summaries for students enrolled in the specified entity. Optional: entityid, allstatus, enrollmentids (plus 7 more).

tools.name: gradebook_get-entity-work
tools.description: Gets the list of items that have been graded or need grading in a course back to a specified date. Optional: entityid, date, outstanding (plus 2 more).

tools.name: gradebook_get-grade
tools.description: This command gets the grade detail for the specified user enrollment and item. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid.

tools.name: gradebook_get-grade-history
tools.description: This command gets the history of grades for an item in the gradebook for the specified user enrollment. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid.

tools.name: gradebook_get-item-analysis
tools.description: Some items compute their score from scores assigned within the item. Optional: entityid, itemid, groupid (plus 6 more).

tools.name: gradebook_get-item-report
tools.description: Some items compute their score from scores assigned within the item. Optional: entityid, itemid, groupid (plus 8 more).

tools.name: gradebook_get-list
tools.description: This command lists entities (courses and sections) that have gradebooks. Optional: title, reference, domainid.

tools.name: gradebook_get-rubric-mastery
tools.description: This command gets report data that shows how students are performing for items related to the specified rubric. Optional: entityid, rubricentityid, rubricpath (plus 1 more).

tools.name: gradebook_get-rubric-stats
tools.description: This command gets detailed information about responses and scores associated with the rules in a rubric. Optional: entityid, path, version (plus 1 more).

tools.name: gradebook_get-summary
tools.description: This command gets a summary of course participants that match the specified parameters. Optional: entityid, allstatus, itemid (plus 4 more).

tools.name: gradebook_get-user
tools.description: This command gets gradebook detail for the specified user. Optional: userid, allstatus, entityid (plus 6 more).

tools.name: gradebook_get-weights
tools.description: This command gets the item and category gradebook weights for the specified entity, optionally filtered by a specific grading period. Optional: entityid, periodid.

tools.name: gradebook_getentitygradebook2
tools.description: This command gets grades for all students enrolled in the specified entity. Optional: entityid, allstatus, forcerequireditems (plus 8 more).

tools.name: gradebook_getentitygradebook3
tools.description: This command gets grades for students enrolled in the specified entity. Optional: entityid, allstatus, enrollmentids (plus 8 more).

tools.name: groups_add-members
tools.description: This command adds one or more member enrollments to an existing group. Optional: groupid, enrollmentid.

tools.name: groups_create
tools.description: This command creates one or more groups in the specified owner course. Optional: domainid, ownerid, reference (plus 2 more).

tools.name: groups_get
tools.description: This command gets information for a particular group. Optional: groupid.

tools.name: groups_get-enrollment-list
tools.description: This command lists enrollments for the specified group. Optional: groupid.

tools.name: groups_get-list
tools.description: This command lists groups in the specified owner entity (course). Optional: ownerid, includeenrollments, select (plus 1 more).

tools.name: groups_remove-members
tools.description: This command removes one or more member enrollments from an existing group. Optional: groupid, enrollmentid.

tools.name: groups_update
tools.description: This command updates the title, set ID, reference, and data of one or more groups. Optional: groupid, title, reference (plus 1 more).

tools.name: items_assign
tools.description: Assigning an item to a folder changes the item’s parent and sequence to the specified values. Optional: entityid, itemid, folderid (plus 1 more).

tools.name: items_copy
tools.description: This command copies one or more items from one course to another. Optional: sourceentityid, sourceitemid, destinationentityid (plus 2 more).

tools.name: items_find-personalized-entities
tools.description: This command finds the course, enrollment, and group entities that contain items which have been personalized in the way specified by the qu. Optional: courseid, query, itemid (plus 3 more).

tools.name: items_get-data
tools.description: This command gets the manifest data (see Course Data ) for the specified entity (course, section, group, or enrollment) except for the <item. Optional: entityid, cached.

tools.name: items_get-links
tools.description: This command gets a list of manifest items that link to the specified item through course or item chaining. Optional: entityid, itemid, derivatives (plus 3 more).

tools.name: items_get-list
tools.description: This command lists items. Optional: entityid, itemid, query (plus 1 more).

tools.name: items_getitem
tools.description: This command gets a manifest item. Optional: entityid, itemid, version (plus 1 more).

tools.name: items_getiteminfo
tools.description: This command gets information about an item in the course, section or group specified by entityid . Optional: entityid, itemid.

tools.name: items_getmanifest
tools.description: This command gets the manifest for the specified entity (course, section, group, or enrollment). Optional: entityid, cached.

tools.name: items_getmanifestinfo
tools.description: This command gets information about the manifest of one or more courses or sections. Optional: entityid.

tools.name: items_getmanifestitem
tools.description: This command gets an item and optionally some of its descendents from the manifest of a course or section. Optional: entityid, itemid, generations.

tools.name: items_list-assignable
tools.description: ListAssignableItems uses the assignableitemsquery attribute on the folderid item to list items in the course that may be assigned to folderi. Optional: entityid, folderid, showassigned.

tools.name: items_list-restorable
tools.description: This command lists items that have been deleted and can be restored. Optional: entityid.

tools.name: items_navigate
tools.description: This command attempts to navigate a user's enrollment to a course item. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, password (plus 14 more).

tools.name: items_put
tools.description: This command puts one or more items in a manifest. Optional: entityid, itemid.

tools.name: items_restore
tools.description: This command restores one or more items in a manifest. Optional: entityid, itemid, version.

tools.name: items_search
tools.description: This command searches course content that has been marked by course creators as searchable and returns a paginated list of results. Optional: entityid, omitentityid, itemtype (plus 4 more).

tools.name: items_unassign
tools.description: Unassigning an item changes the item’s parent and sequence to their default values (the values they would have if they had never been assign. Optional: entityid, itemid.

tools.name: items_update-data
tools.description: This command updates the manifest data (see Course Data ) on the specified entity (course or section.) Only the elements specified in the PO. Optional: entityid.

tools.name: objectives_create-sets
tools.description: This command creates one or more objective sets or objective map sets, which are containers for either objectives or objective maps, respect. Optional: name, domainid, reference (plus 2 more).

tools.name: objectives_get-list
tools.description: This command gets a list of learning objectives. Optional: setid, guid, parent (plus 2 more).

tools.name: objectives_get-map-list
tools.description: This command gets the list of maps defined in an objective map set. Optional: setid.

tools.name: objectives_get-mastery
tools.description: This command gets objective mastery report data for the specified entity using student scores from objective-aligned items and questions. Optional: entityid, setid, guid (plus 2 more).

tools.name: objectives_get-mastery-detail
tools.description: This command summarizes a single learning objective's mastery for each enrollment in the specified entities. Optional: entityid, guid, allstatus (plus 3 more).

tools.name: objectives_get-mastery-summary
tools.description: This command lists learning objectives and summarizes their mastery for enrollments in the specified entities. Optional: entityid, allstatus, setid (plus 7 more).

tools.name: objectives_get-set
tools.description: This command gets information for a objective set or objective map set. Optional: setid, select.

tools.name: objectives_get-subject-list
tools.description: This command gets the list of subjects covered by the learning objectives for an objective set. Optional: setid, guid, parent (plus 1 more).

tools.name: objectives_list-sets
tools.description: This command gets a list of objective sets or objective map sets. Optional: domainid, includedescendantdomains, limit (plus 6 more).

tools.name: objectives_put
tools.description: This creates or updates one or more learning objectives and puts them in an objective set. Optional: guid, id, title (plus 5 more).

tools.name: objectives_put-maps
tools.description: This command creates or updates one or more objective maps and puts them into an objective map set. Optional: setid, guid, correlation (plus 1 more).

tools.name: objectives_restore-set
tools.description: This command restores a deleted objective set. Optional: setid.

tools.name: objectives_update-sets
tools.description: This command updates the name, reference, and other attributes of one or more objective sets or objective map sets. Optional: setid, name, domainid (plus 3 more).

tools.name: peergrading_get-response
tools.description: This command gets a peer's response to a student's submission. Optional: enrollmentid, filepath, itemid (plus 3 more).

tools.name: peergrading_get-response-info
tools.description: This command retrieves information about peer responses from the server. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, peerid.

tools.name: peergrading_get-response-list
tools.description: This command lists peer's responses to the specified student's submission to a course item. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, select.

tools.name: peergrading_get-review-list
tools.description: This command lists peers that may be reviewed by the specified enrollment user. Optional: peerid, itemid.

tools.name: peergrading_put-response
tools.description: This command puts peer response data including comments, rubric score, and likert responses to the server. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, peerid.

tools.name: ratings_get-item
tools.description: This command gets a user rating on a manifest item. Optional: entityid, itemid.

tools.name: ratings_get-item-summary
tools.description: This command gets the summary of user ratings on a manifest item. Optional: entityid, itemid, flags.

tools.name: ratings_put-item
tools.description: This command puts a user rating on a manifest item. Optional: entityid, itemid, rating.

tools.name: reports_get-info
tools.description: This command lists the information about a report including the parameters required to run it. Optional: reportid.

tools.name: reports_get-list
tools.description: This command lists all reports defined on a domain. Optional: domainid.

tools.name: reports_get-runnable-list
tools.description: This command lists all reports available to the currently logged-on user. Optional: entityid, domainid.

tools.name: reports_run
tools.description: This command runs the specified report. Optional: reportid, entityid, format (plus 2 more).

tools.name: rights_create-role
tools.description: This command creates a role on a given domain. Optional: domainid, name, privileges (plus 2 more).

tools.name: rights_get
tools.description: This command gets the rights granted to the specified actor (user or role) for the specified entity (domain, course, or section). Optional: actorid, entityid.

tools.name: rights_get-actor
tools.description: This command lists entities that an actor (user) has rights for. Optional: actorid, entitytypes.

tools.name: rights_get-effective
tools.description: This command gets the effective rights granted to the current user for the specified entity (domain, course, or section). Optional: entityid.

tools.name: rights_get-effective-subscription-list
tools.description: This command lists effective subscriptions for the current signed-in user, including those inherited from the user's domain, and excluding a. Optional: select.

tools.name: rights_get-entity
tools.description: This command lists users and the rights granted to those users for the specified entity (domain, course, section, enrollment or user.). Optional: entityid.

tools.name: rights_get-entity-subscription-list
tools.description: This command lists subscriptions to the specified entity (course or domain). Optional: entityid, subscriberid.

tools.name: rights_get-list
tools.description: This command lists rights granted to users on entities (domains, users, and enrollments). Optional: domainid, restrictdomain.

tools.name: rights_get-personas
tools.description: This command gets the list of personas associated with a user. Optional: userid, domainid.

tools.name: rights_get-role
tools.description: This command gets information for a role. Optional: roleid.

tools.name: rights_get-subscription-list
tools.description: This command lists subscriptions explicitly assigned to the specified subscriber (user or domain). Optional: subscriberid, entityid.

tools.name: rights_list-roles
tools.description: This command lists roles defined for a domain. Optional: domainid.

tools.name: rights_restore-role
tools.description: This command restores a role that has been previously deleted. Optional: roleid.

tools.name: rights_update
tools.description: This command updates the rights (flags) granted to the specified user (actorid) for the domain or enrollment specified by entityid. Optional: actorid, entityid, roleid (plus 2 more).

tools.name: rights_update-role
tools.description: This command updates the name, domainid, reference, or privileges for a role. Optional: roleid, name, domainid (plus 3 more).

tools.name: rights_update-subscriptions
tools.description: This command creates or updates the subscription for the specified subscriber. Optional: subscriberid, entityid, startdate (plus 2 more).

tools.name: session_clear-second-factor-authentication
tools.description: Clears 2FA (second factor authentication) settings for the specified user account, allowing the user to login without 2FA (the user will hav. Optional: userid.

tools.name: session_create-second-factor-authentication-secret
tools.description: This command creates an RFC 6238 second factor authentication secret for use with 2FA authentication. Optional: encryption.

tools.name: session_extend-session
tools.description: Each API command automatically refreshes the authorization token, extending the expiration for the duration originally specified at login, b.

tools.name: session_finish-password-reset
tools.description: This command updates the password of the specified user. Optional: token, password.

tools.name: session_force-password-change
tools.description: Forces a user to change their password the next time they login, exactly as if their password had expired. Optional: userid.

tools.name: session_get-key
tools.description: This command retrieves a name/value pair from an entity. Optional: entityid, name.

tools.name: session_get-password-login-attempt-history
tools.description: Gets the record of password login attempts for the specified user account. Optional: userid, earliestrecordtoreturn.

tools.name: session_get-password-question
tools.description: This command gets the question to ask a user who has forgotten their password. Optional: username.

tools.name: session_login
tools.description: For server-side API integrations, OAuth 2.0 Application Identity is now available as an alternative authentication mechanism. Optional: username, password, expireseconds (plus 3 more).

tools.name: session_logout
tools.description: This command terminates the session state for an authenticated user. Optional: reusable, clearallbrowserdata.

tools.name: session_proxy
tools.description: This command starts a session as a different user. Optional: userid, noazt.

tools.name: session_put-key
tools.description: This command stores a name/value pair on an entity. Optional: entityid, name, value.

tools.name: session_reset-lockout
tools.description: This command resets an account that has been locked out due to too many contiguous password failures. Optional: userid.

tools.name: session_reset-password
tools.description: This command sends an email to the specified user with a time-limited link that can be used to reset their password. Optional: username, firstname, lastname (plus 1 more).

tools.name: session_second-factor-authenticate
tools.description: This command completes the two factor part of authentication for users who have opted for two factor authentication. Optional: otp, rememberdevice.

tools.name: session_setup-second-factor-authentication
tools.description: Turns on second factor authentication for an account. Optional: delivery, encryption, secret (plus 2 more).

tools.name: session_unproxy
tools.description: This command ends a proxy session. Optional: noazt.

tools.name: session_update-password
tools.description: This command updates the password of the specified user. Optional: userid, token, password (plus 1 more).

tools.name: session_update-password-question-answer
tools.description: This command updates the password question and answer for the specified user. Optional: userid, passwordquestion, passwordanswer (plus 1 more).

tools.name: submissions_get-sco-data
tools.description: This command gets a user's SCORM data for a SCO activity from the server. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, review (plus 1 more).

tools.name: submissions_get-student
tools.description: This command gets a student's submission. Optional: enrollmentid, filepath, inline (plus 3 more).

tools.name: submissions_get-student-history
tools.description: This command gets the history of submissions for an item in the gradebook for the specified user enrollment. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid.

tools.name: submissions_get-student-info
tools.description: This command retrieves information about one or more student submissions from the server. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid.

tools.name: submissions_get-teacher-response
tools.description: This command gets a teacher's response to a student's submission. Optional: enrollmentid, filepath, inline (plus 3 more).

tools.name: submissions_get-teacher-response-info
tools.description: This command retrieves information about teacher responses from the server. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid.

tools.name: submissions_get-work-in-progress
tools.description: This command gets a work-in-progress file. Optional: enrollmentid, filepath, inline (plus 3 more).

tools.name: submissions_put-item-activity
tools.description: This command reports per-item student time spent to the server. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, newattempt (plus 1 more).

tools.name: submissions_put-sco-data
tools.description: This command puts a user's SCORM data for a SCO activity to the server. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, name (plus 1 more).

tools.name: submissions_put-student
tools.description: This command puts a student submission for an activity to the server. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, recordactivity.

tools.name: submissions_put-teacher-response
tools.description: This command puts teacher response data including scores, comments, and grade status flags to the server. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, zerounscored.

tools.name: submissions_put-teacher-responses
tools.description: This command puts one or more teacher responses including scores and grade status flags to the server. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, scoredversion (plus 8 more).

tools.name: submissions_put-work-in-progress
tools.description: This command puts a work-in-progress file on the server in preparation for a student submission. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid, filepath (plus 2 more).

tools.name: submissions_submit-work-in-progress
tools.description: This command submits work-in-progress files on the server as a completed submission for the student. Optional: enrollmentid, itemid.

tools.name: system_get-command-list
tools.description: This returns a complete list of all commands available on the API Server.

tools.name: system_get-entity-type
tools.description: This command gets the entity type (Course, Domain, Group, or Section) for a given entity ID. Optional: entityid.

tools.name: system_get-status
tools.description: The API servers do fairly extensive self-testing for all subsystems. Optional: rating, sms, html.

tools.name: system_send-mail
tools.description: This command sends an e-mail to recipients that are enrolled in the same entity as that specified by the sender's enrollmentid . Optional: enrollmentid.

tools.name: tokens_create-command
tools.description: This command creates one or more command tokens. Optional: scopeentityid, description, runasuserid (plus 8 more).

tools.name: tokens_get-command
tools.description: This command gets details about a previously created command token. Optional: commandtokenid.

tools.name: tokens_get-command-info
tools.description: This command gets the description and other non-sensitive info about a previously created command token from the code. Optional: code, scopedomainid.

tools.name: tokens_list-command
tools.description: This command lists all the command tokens created by a particular user and associated with a specified domain, course, group, or user. Optional: onlyvalid, runasuserid, scopeentityid.

tools.name: tokens_redeem-command
tools.description: This command redeems a command token using the code given to the currently authenticated user by the creator. Optional: code, commandtokenid, scopedomainid.

tools.name: tokens_update-command
tools.description: This command updates one or more existing command tokens, regenerating codes if the desired length or per-user settings change. Optional: commandtokenid, scopeentityid, description (plus 9 more).

tools.name: users_create
tools.description: This command creates one or more users. Optional: forcepasswordchange, type, username (plus 11 more).

tools.name: users_get
tools.description: This command gets information for a particular user. Optional: userid, select.

tools.name: users_get-active-count
tools.description: Gets the number of active users either currently or for the given date range. Optional: domainid, includedescendantdomains, persona (plus 5 more).

tools.name: users_get-activity
tools.description: This command lists the login activity for a user. Optional: userid, startdate, enddate.

tools.name: users_get-activity-stream
tools.description: This command lists activities in a user's activity stream. Optional: userid, enrollmentid, startkey (plus 2 more).

tools.name: users_get-domain-activity
tools.description: This command lists activity for all users in a specified domain. Optional: domainid, startdate, enddate (plus 2 more).

tools.name: users_get-profile-picture
tools.description: This command gets binary content for the user's profile picture if it exists. Optional: entityid, usedefault.

tools.name: users_list
tools.description: This command lists users. Optional: domainid, includedescendantdomains, limit (plus 4 more).

tools.name: users_restore
tools.description: This command restores a deleted user. Optional: userid.

tools.name: users_update
tools.description: This command updates the first name, last name, reference field, e-mail address, and flags for one or more users. Optional: userid, domainid, username (plus 5 more).

tools.name: users_verify-email
tools.description: This command verifies a messaging account associated with a user. Optional: type, code, userid.

tools.name: wikis_copy-pages
tools.description: This command copies one or more wiki pages from the specified source course, item and group to the specified destination course, item and gr. Optional: sourceentityid, sourceitemid, sourcegroupid (plus 5 more).

tools.name: wikis_get-page-list
tools.description: This command lists metadata for wiki pages. Optional: entityid, itemid, groupid (plus 2 more).

tools.name: wikis_list-restorable-pages
tools.description: This command lists wiki pages that have been deleted from a course or section and can be restored. Optional: entityid, itemid, groupid (plus 1 more).

tools.name: wikis_put-page
tools.description: This command puts a wiki page to the server. Optional: entityid, itemid, groupid (plus 1 more).

tools.name: wikis_restore-pages
tools.description: This command restores one or more wiki pages in a course or section. Optional: entityid, groupid, itemid (plus 2 more).

tools.name: wikis_update-page-viewed
tools.description: This command updates a user’s viewed state of one or more wiki pages. Optional: username, password, token.
